description_long: This object is a neatly arranged sushi meal set on a black rectangular placemat. At the center, four pieces of salmon nigiri sushi are aligned on a sleek black serving tray, each piece featuring a slice of orange-pink salmon atop a compact mound of white rice. To the right, a pair of wooden chopsticks rests beside a red bowl filled with fluffy white rice, and a small white spoon is placed nearby. On the left, a white cup contains a green liquid, likely green tea, and a small square dish, possibly for soy sauce, sits between the cup and the sushi tray. The overall presentation is minimalist and elegant, with clean lines and a harmonious color palette.
description: A minimalist sushi meal set featuring four salmon nigiri on a black tray, accompanied by rice, green tea, chopsticks, and a soy sauce dish on a black placemat.
description_view_0: Front view showing four salmon nigiri on a black tray, with a red rice bowl, green tea cup, soy sauce dish, and chopsticks neatly arranged on a black placemat.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backs of the sushi pieces, with the rice bowl and green tea cup behind, and chopsticks laid out horizontally.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with the rice bowl and green tea cup in the foreground, sushi tray behind, and chopsticks standing upright in the rice bowl.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the length of the sushi tray, with the rice bowl and green tea cup to the left and chopsticks resting across the tray.
